notes: HAR-369 runtime-test-backed parity evidence for residual order-edit and order-delete support. The integration test stages a local order, begins a calculated-order edit, adds a custom item, adds/removes a line-item discount, adds/updates/removes shipping lines, commits the edit with downstream order visibility, and separately stages orderDelete tombstones with downstream order/orders/ordersCount reads. Live conformance credentials were valid for schema/signature probing, but the executable evidence is local-runtime fixture backed because these supported mutations must not write to Shopify during proxy runtime.
